series_metadata.series_description: Record supports existing inpatient/outpatient hospital payment system policy under the Medicaid Program. File contains, but is not limited to, printouts documenting payment policy rationale; financial statements; hospital cost data; third party data (Medicare supporting data); statistical analyses; and related reports that are the basis for existing hospital payments.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office until claims are paid under the policy, then transfer to the records center to retain until the policy is superseded and audits are completed, reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office until the policy is superseded and audits are completed, reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
